definition_en: A part of the body that has a specific function, such as the heart or liver
example: The lungs are organs responsible for breathing.

definition_en: The framework of bones that supports the body
example: The human skeleton has 206 bones.

definition_en: Body tissue that contracts to produce movement
example: Regular exercise strengthens your muscles.

definition_en: The movement of blood around the body through the heart and vessels
example: Exercise improves blood circulation.

definition_en: The system of cells and processes that protects the body from infection
example: A healthy diet supports a strong immune system.

definition_en: A fibre that transmits signals between the brain and other parts of the body
example: He damaged a nerve in his back during the accident.

definition_en: The series of bones running down the back, also called the backbone
example: Good posture protects your spine.

definition_en: A blood vessel that carries blood towards the heart
example: The nurse found it difficult to locate the vein.

definition_en: A blood vessel that carries blood away from the heart
example: Blocked arteries can lead to a heart attack.

definition_en: One of the two organs in the chest used for breathing
example: Smoking causes serious damage to the lungs.

definition_en: One of the two organs that filter waste from the blood
example: He was on dialysis while waiting for a kidney transplant.

definition_en: The process by which food is broken down in the body
example: Fibre helps improve digestion.

definition_en: The chemical processes in the body that convert food into energy
example: People with a fast metabolism burn calories more quickly.

definition_en: A chemical substance produced in the body that controls certain functions
example: Stress affects hormone levels.

definition_en: A group of cells in the body that have the same structure and function
example: Scar tissue forms after a wound heals.

definition_en: The lower part of the face that holds the teeth and moves when you eat or talk
example: He clenched his jaw in frustration.

definition_en: The joint between the hand and the lower arm
example: She sprained her wrist playing tennis.

definition_en: The short thick finger on the side of the hand
example: He gave a thumbs up to show he agreed.

definition_en: The back part of the foot below the ankle
example: Her heel hurt after walking all day.

definition_en: The flat part of the face above the eyebrows
example: She touched his forehead to check for a fever.

definition_en: The thin piece of skin that covers and protects the eye
example: Her eyelids felt heavy after a long day.

definition_en: The way you hold your body when sitting or standing
example: Poor posture can lead to back pain over time.
